who: restaurant kitchen managers processing 5–15 inventory reports/day
offer: For restaurant kitchen managers processing 5–15 inventory reports/day, inaccurate inventory tracking causes increased food waste. We provide daily food inventory usage reports instead of manual inventory tracking spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate inventory tracking leads to food waste and increased costs.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for kitchen managers
Indie Hackers discussions on inventory solutions
DM outreach to kitchen managers with demo video
Community forums sharing inventory management tools
try_it: Let users try daily usage report generation for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress updates in communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Enable CSV import for existing inventory data
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
